39.gl: Shelemjah, the name of nine Israelites
39.dv: or שֶׁלֶמְיָהוּ; from H8002 (שֶׁלֶם) and H3050 (יָהּ); thankoffering of Jah;

39.gl: Adajah, the name of eight Israelites
39.dv: or עֲדָיָהוּ; from H5710 (עָדָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has adorned;

39.gl: Nathan, the name of five Israelites

40.dv: from H4100 (מָה) and H5068 (נָדַב) with a particle interposed; what (is) like (a) liberal (man) ?;

41.gl: Shemarjah, the name of four Israelites
41.dv: or שְׁמַרְיָהוּ; from H8104 (שָׁמַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has guarded;

41.gl: Shelemjah, the name of nine Israelites
41.dv: or שֶׁלֶמְיָהוּ; from H8002 (שֶׁלֶם) and H3050 (יָהּ); thankoffering of Jah;

41.gl: Azarel, the name of five Israelites
41.dv: from H5826 (עָזַר) and H410 (אֵל); God has helped;

42.gl: Joseph, the name of seven Israelites
42.dv: future of H3254 (יָסַף); let him add (or perhaps simply active participle adding);

42.gl: Amarjah, the name of nine Israelites
42.dv: or prolonged אֲמַרְיָהוּ; from H559 (אָמַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has said (i.e. promised);

42.gl: Shallum, the name of fourteen Israelites
42.dv: or (shorter) שַׁלֻּם; the same as H7966 (שִׁלּוּם);

43.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
43.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

43.gl: Nebo, the name of a Babylonian deity, also of a mountain in Moab, and of a place in Palestine
Jeiel, the name of six Israelites
43.dv: from H3261 (יָעָה) and H410 (אֵל); carried away of God;

43.gl: Benajah, the name of twelve Israelites
43.dv: or בּנָיָהוּ; (prolonged) from H1129 (בָּנָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has built;

43.gl: Mattithjah, the name of four Israelites
43.dv: or מַתִּתְיָהוּ; from H4991 (מַתָּת) and H3050 (יָהּ); gift of Jah;

43.gl: Joel, the name of twelve Israelites
43.dv: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H410 (אֵל); Jehovah (is his) God;

44.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
44.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

44.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
44.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

44.gl: to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative
44.kj: accept, advance, arise, (able to, (armor), suffer to) bear(-er, up), bring (forth), burn, carry (away), cast, contain, desire, ease, exact, exalt (self), extol, fetch, forgive, fur

44.gl: there is or are (or any other form of the verb to be, as may suit the connection)
44.kj: (there) are, (he, it, shall, there, there may, there shall, there should) be, thou do, had, hast, (which) hath, (I, shalt, that) have, (he, it, there) is, substance, it (there) was
44.dv: perhaps from an unused root meaning to stand out, or exist; entity; used adverbially or as a copula for the substantive verb (H1961 (הָיָה));

44.kj: (adulter) ess, each, every, female, [idiom] many, [phrase] none, one, [phrase] together, wife, woman. Often unexpressed in English.
44.dv: feminine of H376 (אִישׁ) or H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ); irregular plural, נָשִׁים;(used in the same wide sense as H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ))

44.gl: strange, in a variety of degrees and applications (foreign, non-relative, adulterous, different, wonderful)
